name: Post-Coma Whiplash
author: concavz
bootlegger: Night 1 is directly followed by Night 2, which is directly followed by Night 3. Days 1 and 2 are skipped entirely.
Each night, instead of during the day, the Savant learns 2 things: 1 is true & 1 is false.
The Artist and Fisherman may choose to use their ability at night.
Once a day, the General may privately ask for info from the Storyteller.
On Night 3, if the Snake Charmer charms a Minion, the Minion swaps characters and alignments & is then poisoned.
